title: Public hearing decision in the case of Tracey Connelly
body: "A judicial Parole Board member, on behalf of the Board’s Chair, has granted the application for Tracey Connelly’s parole hearing to be made public. More information about the reasons for this decision are attached.  The oral hearing listed in October has been adjourned and has not been relisted yet. We will update this page once the hearing is relisted.  For more detail on applying for a parole hearing to be made public, please read more here: Applying for a Parole review to be public - GOV.UK (www.gov.uk) "
